loop1.title: Voltage Monitor (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing live three-phase voltage trends (R-N, Y-N, B-N) and average/max/min voltage KPIs; thresholds and legend values are static metadata, not live measurements.

loop1.title: Current Monitor (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing live current trends (R/Y/B phases, Neutral, Max/Min/Avg) — high/low threshold lines omitted because the asset's nameplate rated current is unknown.
